title: nototriche auricoma
intro: Nototriche auricoma is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the Yellow-flowered Nototriche. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nototriche auricoma include wound healing, treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and its ability to reduce fever. Nototriche auricoma can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a topical ointment or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
